step.text: Collect PAN, Aadhaar, address proof, bank details
step.name: Step 1

step.text: File GST REG-01 on GST portal
step.name: Step 2

mainEntity.name: How long does GST registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3-7 working days from application submission, assuming documents are in order and Aadhaar authentication is successful. Rejection or query from the officer may extend the timeline.

mainEntity.name: Is GST registration mandatory for e-commerce sellers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Under Section 24(ix), every person supplying goods/services through an e-commerce operator must register regardless of turnover threshold.

mainEntity.name: Can a foreigner get GST registration in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Non-resident taxable persons register under Section 24(v). Registration valid for the period specified (minimum 1 day). Advance tax deposit equal to estimated liability required.
Section 10 allows small taxpayers (turnover up to ₹1.5 crore for goods, ₹50 lakhs for services) to pay tax at a flat rate (1-6%) without ITC. Simpler compliance — quarterly returns.

mainEntity.name: Why register through a CA firm instead of doing it myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: Registration is day one. What follows is monthly return filing, ITC reconciliation, annual return, and potential notices/appeals. A CA firm provides the complete lifecycle — registration, compliance, and defence. We are also positioned to handle GST appeals if any dispute arises.

mainEntity.name: What is the Input Service Distributor (ISD) registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: ISD registration under Section 24(viii) is required when a head office or corporate office receives common invoices for services (rent, professional fees, software licences) consumed by multiple branches in different states. The ISD distributes the input tax credit to respective branch GSTINs proportionally. Mandatory if your business has centralised procurement with multi-state operations.

mainEntity.name: Can GST registration be cancelled voluntarily?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Apply for cancellation via Form GST REG-16 on the GST portal if: business is discontinued, transferred, or turnover falls below threshold. Final return (GSTR-10) must be filed within 3 months of cancellation. We handle the cancellation process including ITC reversal computation and final return filing.
